meta.title: Level 5 Checkpoint
meta.description: Complete uncontested auctions from both sides

blocks.prompt: Describe the three-bid framework -- open, respond, rebid -- and explain how each bid narrows the picture for the partnership. Use a concrete example: imagine you open 1♥ with 16 HCP and a 6-card heart suit. Partner responds 1♠ with 11 HCP and 5 spades. Walk through what each player knows after each bid, and what the opener's rebid should be.
